headline: Hormel Foods Antitrust Lawsuit Adds To Pressure On Pork Pricing Story
summary: Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL) has been named as a defendant in an ongoing federal antitrust lawsuit alleging pork price-fixing in the U.S. foodservice market. A major class action settlement has advanced against a co-defendant, while proceedings continue against Hormel Foods and other companies. The case focuses on alleged coordination of pork prices affecting restaurants, institutional buyers, and other foodservice customers. For investors watching NYSE:HRL, this legal development comes at a...

headline: Is Hormel Foods (HRL) Starting To Look Attractive After A 32% Share Price Slide?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Hormel Foods at around US$19.74 is starting to look like value after a tough few years, or if the stock still has more to prove before it deserves a spot in a diversified portfolio. The share price has retreated, with returns down 3.4% over the past week, 4.5% over the past month, 15.6% year to date, and 32.1% over the last year. These moves can change how the market views both its potential and its risks. Recent coverage has focused on Hormel Foods as a...
